headline: Assessing RTX (RTX) Valuation As Conflicting Fair Value Signals Emerge
summary: Recent performance snapshot for RTX (RTX) RTX (RTX) has attracted attention after a mixed stretch in its share performance, with gains over the past month and year contrasted by a decline over the past 3 months and so far this year. See our latest analysis for RTX. At a share price of $179.66, RTX has seen short term momentum fade with a 90 day share price return that declined 13.01%, even as its 1 year total shareholder return of 32.78% and 3 year total shareholder return of 99.93% keep the...
